# Weekly Investment Recommendations

> Strategy: Swedish small/midcap stocks · 13,000 SEK bankroll · 1–2% risk per trade · Manual execution

## Portfolio Overview

| | |
|---|---|
| Bankroll (strategy) | **13,000 SEK** |
| Portfolio value (cash + positions) | **11,905 SEK** |
| Cash | 5,176 SEK (40% of bankroll) |
| Invested | 6,729 SEK (52% of bankroll) |
| Drawdown from peak | 8.4% |
| Risk mode | **CAUTION — half size (drawdown 5–10%)** |

|---|---|
| Portfolio heat | **2.8%** of capital at open risk (limit: 8.0%) |

**Score breakdown**: Momentum 1M=30 · 3M=51 · 6M=98 · RSI=48 (score=72) · Trend=70 · Volume=100 · Sharpe(1Y)=+0.90 · MaxDD=27.0%
**Category scores** (±1000): Tech=+60 · Val=-60 · Qual=+221 · Safety=+0 · Growth=+90 · Sent=+0 · Panel=n/a
**Entry timing**: ok

**Thesis**: Moderate 3M momentum; cheap valuation (P/FCF 13×); positive FCF trend
**Suggested hold**: 5 weeks

**Valuation**: P/E(ttm)=21.9 · P/E(fwd)=31.4 · EV/EBITDA=15.1 · P/FCF=13.2 · PEG=3.1 · P/B=8.1 · ROE=42.1% · Div=2.3% · P/S=2.0 · Analyst target=415.00 SEK · Upside=3% · *adj via pe_trailing*
Fundamentals: Rev +11% YoY | ROIC 37% | ND/EBITDA 0.0× | Cash conv 1.66 | Gross margin 48% | Op margin 7%
**Short interest**: 1.7% float · ratio —
**FCF Screen** (4yr): Margin=15.5% (target ≥8%) ✓ · Trend=✓ · Cycle-resilient=✓ · → Strong FCF candidate

**Podcast signals**:
- **BUY** (moderate) — Nordea utfärdade köprekommendation; aktien steg över 5% efter att ha pressats efter sin senaste rapport. — *"Claes Olsson, som jag brukar säga är en konkurrent, stiger istället över 5%. Det är efter en köpreko"*
- **HOLD** (weak) — Raised operating margin target to 12% (confidence signal), but record profitability is questioned for durability and top-line growth (~9%) underwhelms. — *"Härom veckan så höjde man ju faktiskt marginalmålet. Till just 12%. Kommer det hålla?"*
- **WATCH** (weak) — Discussed as a likely beneficiary of the new EU EUR3-per-item parcel tariff that erodes Temu/AliExpress price advantage. — *"Klaus Olsson och Rusta. Men de tar in dem på ett helt annat sätt. Och de kommer ju inte bli belastad"*

> **Note**: stop distance is sized from the recommendation close (401.20 SEK). If filled outside the buy range, recalculate stop as: `fill_price × (1 − 1.5 × 4.7% ATR)` = 379.98 SEK at buy-range upper.
